hypothesis: If a diffusion model trained exclusively on metastable state data is guided during inference by interpolating conditional scores between reactant and product states (SBI) and subsequently refined via energy-maximizing force projection along the score-difference reaction coordinate (SAA), then it will generate accurate transition state structures without requiring any transition state training data, because the interpolated score fields implicitly encode the reaction pathway geometry and the ascent procedure corrects for the energy saddle point condition.
